title: EF Core 10大性能陷阱及修复方案
summary_angle: EF Core 查询模式：开发环境正常通过，生产环境爆炸——10个常见陷阱与修复方案
main_conclusion: EF Core 10 大性能陷阱（N+1、全实体返回、无 AsNoTracking、懒加载、笛卡尔积爆炸、延迟过滤、暴力批量、无分页、缺索引、未编译查询）均可在 10 行代码内修复

information_blocks.label: N+1陷阱
information_blocks.visual: 多个SQL闪电箭头从单个请求爆发

information_blocks.label: 投影修复
information_blocks.visual: 大块实体 vs 精准DTO对比

information_blocks.label: 懒加载炸弹
information_blocks.visual: 代码看起来正常，数据库被暗中轰炸

main_subject: 震惊的.NET开发者盯着4秒响应时间的监控屏幕，后方数据库服务器爆炸冒烟
subject_action: 开发者手指指向屏幕上N+1查询数量，旁边有代码注解
composition: wide 2.35:1，左侧主体（开发者+屏幕），右侧3个分镜信息块
background: 深色服务器机房，绿色代码流
comic_style_reason: analysis类文章，10个错误的对比与修复呈现冲突与判断张力，适合american-comic的粗轮廓、halftone、graphic-novel对照风格
final_prompt: Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1, american comic graphic novel style. Left panel: a shocked .NET developer staring at a monitor showing '4s' response time in red, halftone background, bold ink outlines. Center: burst panel showing 101 SQL lightning bolts firing from a single API request labeled 'N+1'. Right: two comparison panels - top shows large entity blob vs slim DTO projection labeled '4s→80ms', bottom shows a single UPDATE arrow crushing 10000 rows labeled '×300'. Dark server room background with green code streams. Limited Chinese labels: N+1, 4s→80ms, ×300. No fake UI, no fake charts, no fake dashboards, no English slogans. Comic book halftone dots, speed lines, bold outlines.
